Notes: Prerequisites succeed, then UPDATE deletes an RRset type absent at the target name. Query verifies the helper owner remains unchanged regardless of UPDATE reply.

Steps.Description: Satisfy a prerequisite at emptytype.campus.edu., then delete the absent TXT RRset at that owner.

Steps.Name: emptytype.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe that the pre-existing A RRset remains present after the UPDATE, regardless of whether the server returned NOERROR or NXRRSET.
